Skarbrand: pure melee beatstick; +1 A aura for Khorne, Rage Embodied, Murderlust (Advance and charge)
Bloodthirster: greater daemon; +1 to hit aura for Khorne; Relentless Carnage (8D6 mortals); flexible weapon options (bloodflail/lash)
Skulltaker: character killer; Precision, re-roll hits/wounds vs Characters; gives Devastating Wounds to bloodletters unit
Bloodmaster: budget Khorne leader; +1 to wound for unit; 6" consolidate
Skullmaster: mounted leader for Bloodcrushers; charge gives Devastating Wounds to juggernaut horns; forces Battle-shock on charge
Rendmaster on Blood Throne: force multiplier; +1 S/AP/D to target for all Khorne units within 18"
Karanak: hunter beast; picks prey for re-roll wounds; FNP 3+ vs Psychic/mortals; leads Flesh Hounds
Bloodletters: battleline; 5++ invuln; 2A S5 AP-2 D2 hellblade; Bane of Cowards (desperate escape on fall back); daemonic icon (LD6+) / instrument (+1 charge)
Bloodcrushers: mounted shock cavalry; 5++ invuln; Brass Stampede (D3 mortals per model on charge); 10" M T7 3+ 4W
Flesh Hounds: fast screening; 12" M 5++ invuln; can return to SR; FNP 3+ vs Psychic
Skull Cannon: artillery; 48" S9 AP-1 D2 Blast; forces Battle-shock after shooting; T9 4++ 9W
Kairos Fateweaver: CP battery (gain 1/turn); enemy stratagem tax (+1CP); Infernal Gateway witchfire
Lord of Change: ranged platform; Master of Magicks (choose Ignores Cover/Lethal/Sustained D3); Daemon Lord +1 S aura for Tzeentch
The Changeling: Lone Operative; Stealth; forces Battle-shock before targeting; mischief aura
Fateskimmer: mounted leader for Screamers; gives Lethal Hits melee; once per battle SR escape
Fluxmaster: leader for Horrors; -1 to hit vs unit; once/round change a roll to 6
Changecaster: leader for Horrors; Sustained Hits 1 for unit ranged; Storm of Mutating Sorcery
Pink Horrors: battleline; Split into 2 Blue Horrors on death; 4++ invuln; 2A S4 AP-1 D1 Psychic pistol
Blue Horrors: battleline (from Split); 4++ invuln; Sullen Malevolence (-1 LD aura); Exploding Horrors (self-destruct mortals)
Flamers: torrent unit; D6 auto-hit S4 AP-1 D1; Bounding Leaps (Fall Back and shoot); 9" M
Exalted Flamer: leader for Flamers; gives Assault; blue fire (3A S9 AP-3 D3) or pink fire (2D6 torrent); Flames of Change (-2" M / -2 Advance/Charge)
Screamers: fast skirmisher; 14" M; Anti-Monster/Anti-Vehicle 4+; Slashing Dive (mortals on move-over)
Burning Chariot: mobile gun platform; 12" M; blue/pink fire + screamer bites + flamer mouths; Eldritch Flames (remove cover)
Rotigus: rainfather; -2" M / -1 OC aura; +1 D to Nurgle attacks vs target; streams of brackish filth (2D6 S8 AP-2 D1 Dev Wounds Torrent)
Great Unclean One: greater daemon; +1 T aura; Nurgle's Rot (-1 T enemy); bileblade/doomsday bell/bilesword options; FNP 6+
Poxbringer: leader for Plaguebearers; 5+ crit hits; -1 BS aura
Spoilpox Scrivener: leader for Plaguebearers; Sustained Hits 1 melee; +1 OC
Epidemius: epic hero leader; 4++ for unit; CP generation on 7+ kills
Sloppity Bilepiper: leader for Plaguebearers; +1" M and re-roll Advance; forced Battle-shoot aura in fight phase
Horticulous Slimux: Beasts of Nurgle leader; re-roll charges; free Heroic Intervention once; Seed the Garden (SoC from terrain)
Plaguebearers: battleline; 5++ invuln; Lethal Hits; Infected Outbreak (sticky objectives); daemonic icon / instrument
Nurglings: swarm battleline; Infiltrators; Mischief Makers (-1 hit melee); 4W each; OC 0
Beasts of Nurgle: regenerating; regain all wounds each phase; Scouts 6"; Deadly Demise 1; Devastating Wounds
Plague Drones: mounted; Death's Heads (re-roll wounds debuff); 10" M T8 6+ 5W 5++
Shalaxi Helbane: Slaanesh beatstick; Soulpiercer S12 AP-3 D6+2 Precision; quarry mechanic (re-roll all); 14" M 3+ 4++ 20W
Keeper of Secrets: greater daemon; +1 AP melee aura; Mesmerising Form (-1 to hit); 14" M; Shining Aegis option (SV 3+)
Infernal Enrapturess: leader for Daemonettes; return D3 models/turn; anti-Psyker aura (Hazardous on Psychic weapons); Fights First
The Masque of Slaanesh: Lone Operative; Fights First; Eternal Dance (+1 wound/-1 wound aura); Advance/Fall Back and charge
Syll'Esske: leader for Daemonettes; 5+ crit wounds; once-per-game revival on 2+
Contorted Epitome: leader for Daemonettes; FNP 4+ vs mortals/Psychic; Horrible Fascination (stop shooting); Fights First
Tormentbringer: leader for Hellflayers; Sustained Hits 1 aura for Slaanesh melee; fight on death; 14" M
Tranceweaver: leader for Daemonettes; re-roll hits (or full re-roll if target on objective); Symphony of Pain (re-roll all vs Battle-shocked); Fights First
Daemonettes: battleline; 5++ invuln; Fights First; Devastating Wounds; Horrifying Beauty (forced Battle-shock in fight phase)
Hellflayers: Slaanesh chariot; 14" M; charge = +1 S/D; lashes/seekers/slashing claws
Fiends: beast; Soporific Musk (desperate escape on fall back); 12" M T5 4W Devastating Wounds
Seekers: mounted; 14" M Scouts 9"; re-roll Advance/Charge; Devastating Wounds
Be'lakor: Supreme Commander; MUST be Warlord; The Dark Master (SoC 6" aura); Shadow Form pick per round (Wreathed in Shadows 18" target, Pall of Despair auto-BS, Shadow Lord re-roll hits); Stealth
Daemon Prince of Chaos: Lone Operative near Infantry; Prince of Darkness (Stealth aura); Unholy Vigour (once/game 3++); Daemonic Allegiance per god
Daemon Prince with Wings: Fly; Malefic Destruction (+3 A once/game); Harbinger of Death (pick Lethal/Precision/Sustained); Daemonic Allegiance per god
Soul Grinder: Vehicle Walker; Scuttling Walker; Daemonic Allegiance per god (bonus weapon); 8" M T11 3+ 14W 4++
Skull Altar: fortification; 6" SoC aura; re-roll BS for Khorne within 6"; Cover; Infiltrators
Feculent Gnarlmaw: fortification; Stealth aura for Nurgle; Cover; Infiltrators
